---
title: "Why OERs Matter for Creators"
format: html
---

Creating OERs supports wider educational equity and sustainable teaching practices. For creators, the benefits include:

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Increased visibility and impact

Openly shared materials can reach audiences far beyond a single institution.
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Reduced duplication of effort

Others can build on your work instead of re-creating learning materials from scratch.
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Community effort

Others building upon your work can help to refine it and improve upon it with as little or as much effort as the original creator wants to contribute.
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Professional recognition

Licensing and attribution ensure proper credit.
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Innovative pedagogy

Multimedia, local context, learner centred design, and translation become easier within open frameworks.
:::

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20creators/Creator-Effective%20OERs.html)
